text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I'm walking around the central<n>plaza, I spot
Narita Taishin listening to<n>music on a bench.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What the? I don't remember this<n>being on the
charts. Is it new or<n>something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh, so this is what's in right now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you. What do you want?
choice_data_list: What kind of music do you listen to?
What kind of music do you listen to?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't really care. I just play<n>whatever's popular.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nothing in particular.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Songs are all the same. I just like<n>letting them
play.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I do switch up the genres, though.<n>Otherwise, I get
bored of listening to<n>the same thing.
choice_data_list: So would you say you could live without music?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Not exactly. I guess I prefer to have<n>something on
in the background.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But it doesn't matter what it is.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: We continue talking about music as<n>we walk.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Music's just noise that helps pass<n>the time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's not like listening to it has an<n>effect on my
emotions or anything.<n>I'm not a kid.
choice_data_list:
You'd be surprised. Sometimes music can really
move you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh please. Your head's in the clouds.<n>No way
that's true.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
And if it is, then show me something<n>that'll
"move" me. What have you<n>got?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is picky. What kind of<n>music would
she vibe with?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Live R&B? You want me to go to a<n>club for it or
something? I've never<n>really listened to R&B
before, though...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But aren't clubs usually packed? I<n>hate crowds
and loud places.
choice_data_list: Some are less crowded and pretty quiet.
Some are less crowded and pretty quiet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Fine. Then take me to one like that.<n>But I'm
leaving if I don't like it, got it?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, I take her to a music club<n>that's playing
the latest R&B music.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa, this is...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin sways to an intense yet<n>gentle beat
that she's never heard<n>before.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Strange, actually... It was loud, but<n>pretty nice on
the ears...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I guess there's still a world of music<n>out there
I've never heard.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The sounds blended together as if<n>they were
bursting from the soles of<n>my feet.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Heeeey, Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin! Wow, you're here too?!<n>That's so
cooool!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Someone invited me, but I have no<n>idea what's
going on!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that sounds about right.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But it's pretty awesome! I love theway it was like badump, badump!Whomp, whomp!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And then you get this big "wooooo!"<n>feeling inside
yourself! You get it right,<n>Taishin?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, obviously I get it, but youdon't.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm going home now,<n>Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I guess... today wasn't half bad.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Later.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Taishin, waaaait! Let's talk some<n>more and get
real deep about the<n>music!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Literally shut up! Unlike the musicwe just heard, you are loud andannoying.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin leaves in a hurry. It<n>seems like the
new beat has added a<n>little pep to her step.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What's that? Some kind of subculture<n>thing? I
don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, the planetarium's<n>holding
some kind of event for that<n>right now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Listen to pop music as you gaze upon<n>Earth from
space, or something like<n>that.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I suppose we could have a look.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And so, we visit the planetarium.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The lyrics are kinda mysterious. Stuff<n>about
transience, worldly desires, and<n>enlightenment...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
All our worries and hesitations are<n>merely ripples
in the water... Is that all<n>we are?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The celestial music show ends as<n>Narita Taishin
contemplates life.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I can't really describe it, but like...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh? I didn't know you were here too,<n>Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide? You're into this kind of<n>thing?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No, the event just happened to<n>coincide with my
visit here to<n>research celestial bodies.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However, I found that there were<n>some logical
inconsistencies within<n>the lyrics.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Think about it. It's just not possible<n>for emotions
from the largest star in<n>the universe to reach Earth
in an<n>instant.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You should probably approach it less<n>literally.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's all about how you feel. Maybe<n>we're
focusing on the wrong thing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Less literally? Taishin, you don't<n>sound like your
usual sensitive self<n>today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Have you changed your beliefs or<n>something?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not exactly. I guess you could say...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: My vibes are a little different. It's<n>just how I feel.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin appears to have gained<n>a new
perspective from immersing<n>herself in the world of
the latest pop<n>music.
